<!--
Thanks for opening a PR! Please fill in this template — it speeds up review.
Tiny / trivial PRs (typo fixes, doc tweaks) can leave most boxes empty.
-->

## What this PR does

<!-- One sentence — what changes for a user or for an agent calling the MCP. -->

## Why

<!-- The motivation. Link an issue if there is one (e.g. "Closes #12"). -->

## How to verify

<!-- Steps to reproduce / verify. At minimum: `npm test` must pass. -->

- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] `npm test` (smoke test) passes locally
- [ ] If the wire format / .inkbook schema changed, the change is described in the PR body and the version is bumped appropriately
- [ ] If a tool's input shape changed, the description in `src/tools/*.ts` was updated to match

## Notes for the maintainer

<!-- Anything reviewer should pay attention to: tricky tradeoffs, follow-ups
that should land in a future PR, breaking changes, etc. -->
